data.title: Cidara Therapeutics awarded $339M from BARDA for CD388 flu preventative therapeutic development.
data.description: On October 02, 2025, Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDTX), a biotech firm leveraging its Cloudbreak® technology to create drug-Fc conjugate (DFC) therapeutics, revealed it secured an award worth potentially $339 million from the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA). The award stems from the Administration for Strategic Preparedness and Response (ASPR) within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).

data.title: Corvus Pharma appoints David Moore to Board.Exec VP at Novo Nordisk with 27 years experience joining.#biopharma #boardofdirectors
data.description: South San Francisco, California - On October 2, 2025, Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that David Moore, the Executive Vice President of US Operations at Novo Nordisk A/S and President of Novo Nordisk Inc., will be joining their Board of Directors. With an impressive 27-year tenure in the sector, Mr. Moore’s background spans various key areas such as strategy, commercial operations, market access, business development, and investments. This encompasses his involvement in large-cap pharmaceutical firms, biotechnology companies, and private equity ventures. Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc., listed under NASDAQ as CRVS, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity.

data.title: CACI awarded $73M contract to modernize U.S. Air Force's Integrated Broadcast Service for DOD, supporting national security.
data.description: CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) from Reston, Virginia, has secured a new five-year contract exceeding $73 million. The contract aims to enhance the Department of the Air Force's network infrastructure for transmitting crucial intelligence and targeting information swiftly across various domains like air, ground, and space. This initiative supports the Department of Defense (DOD) and allied forces by ensuring efficient communication of time-sensitive data. The modernization efforts are essential for improving operational effectiveness and readiness at the tactical level, enabling timely decision-making for warfighters in the field.

data.title: Expedia Group to share Q3 2025 results on Nov 6, 2025, via webcast. Earnings release after market close, webcast at 1:30 PM PT / 4:30 PM ET.
data.description: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) is scheduled to announce its third quarter financial results for the period ending September 30, 2025, on Thursday, November 6, 2025. This information will be shared through an earnings release and webcast, accessible in the Investor Relations segment of Expedia Group's official website at http://ir.expediagroup.com. The earnings release will become available after the market closes, with the webcast commencing at 1:30 PM Pacific Time / 4:30 PM Eastern Time. A replay of the call will also be accessible post the webcast.

data.title: e.l.f. Cosmetics debuts unique AI campaign "Animal Intelligence" featuring wise words from pets. NYSE: ELF brand is vegan, cruelty-free with 94 products.
data.description: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF) introduced a new campaign called AI: Animal Intelligence, where they showcase insights from pets. The brand, e.l.f. Cosmetics, known for its universal appeal to beauty lovers, offers vegan products that are certified cruelty-free by PETA and Leaping Bunny. The products maintain premium quality at extraordinary prices. The campaign has garnered attention for its unique approach and commitment to ethical beauty practices.

data.description: Edgewise Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent biopharmaceutical company based in Boulder, Colorado, disclosed on October 2, 2025, that they are listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol EWTX. Specializing in treatments for muscle diseases and severe cardiac ailments, the company revealed a recent development where...

data.title: Loop Global's Infinity Flash™ charger gets OCPP 2.0.1 Certification for California's CALeVIP incentives.
data.description: Leading electric vehicle infrastructure company, Loop Global, Inc. (Loop), based in El Segundo, California, announced on October 2, 2025, that its flagship DC fast charger has been certified to the highest global interoperability standard. This charger has also been listed for participation in one of the nation's most generous EV infrastructure rebate programs. This certification and inclusion mark a significant achievement for Loop, showcasing its commitment to top-tier quality and accessibility in the electric vehicle charging sector. The charger's certification to the highest global standard emphasizes its quality and performance in the market. Additionally, its listing in a prominent rebate program highlights the financial incentives available to consumers and businesses looking to invest in EV infrastructure. Loop's accomplishment underscores its leading position in the industry, making electric vehicle charging more widespread and efficient.

data.title: DT Midstream closes successful Guardian Pipeline expansion open season for capacity awards.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, DT Midstream, Inc. revealed that it has finalized a lucrative binding open season to allocate additional capacity on Guardian Pipeline (Guardian). The company (NYSE: DTM) successfully completed this process, marking a significant step in their expansion efforts. This news showcases the company's strategic move to enhance its operations, with optimistic outcomes expected in the near future. It underlines the importance of this development in supporting DT Midstream, Inc.'s growth trajectory and commitment to meeting rising demands in the industry.

data.title: Survey: 1 in 5 employers may introduce pay-to-apply model due to AI resumes overwhelming, 6 in 10 fired employees over mismatched skills.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by AIResumeBuilder.com uncovered that 60% of companies have terminated employees due to their skills failing to align with AI-enhanced resumes. This study highlights a rising challenge faced by hiring managers, with 20% reporting their frustration with the influx of AI-generated resumes for job vacancies. The findings shed light on the impact of technological advancements in recruitment processes, emphasizing the need for job seekers to ensure the accuracy of skills presented on their resumes.

data.title: VLS Environmental Solutions introduces new mercury disposal tech in Texas, Oct. 2025; RCRA-compliant.
data.description: A groundbreaking technology for the permanent disposal of elemental mercury has been introduced by VLS Environmental Solutions in Deer Park, Texas on October 2, 2025. This patent-pending technology is the first of its kind and is compliant with RCRA regulations. VLS Environmental Solutions is known for its leadership in sustainable environmental management.

Members of USW Local 2020-05 have ratified a new four-year collective agreement with Vale, securing a 5% wage increase in the first year and 3% annual increases for the following three years. The contract takes effect immediately and will run through October 26, 2029.

data.title: CFH celebrates 40 years of impact with breakfast event in NYC hosted by Adriana Trigiani, panel moderated by Michael Gargiulo.
data.description: Bestselling author Adriana Trigiani is set to host an event in New York that will feature a panel discussion moderated by Michael Gargiulo from NBC 4 New York. The event, scheduled for October 2, 2025, will be a celebration organized by Care For the Homeless (CFH), a prominent non-profit focused on delivering healthcare services to the homeless community.
